headline: Southern (SO) Valuation Check After Recent 2% Move And Conflicting Fair Value Signals
summary: Southern stock snapshot after recent trading move Southern (SO) has drawn investor attention after a recent single day move of about 2%, prompting a closer look at how its year-to-date gain and recent pullback fit together. Over the past week the stock has been flat, with a one-month performance showing a 4% decline and the past 3 months up about 3%. That mix of short-term consolidation and recent strength is leading some income-focused investors to take a closer look. See our latest analysis...
